step</label><order>1</order><outputs/><section/><step_type display_value="Script">106afb6647032200b4fad7527c9a71e7</step_type><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-25 13:18:36</sys_created_on><sys_id>28c38888d83103107f440f1d303307d7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_scope display_value="SPM Xero Integration">64fdbaa379e103107f4423b77ae41523</sys_scope><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-25 13:18:36</sys_updated_on></sys_hub_step_instance><sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_hub_step_instance</document><document_key>28c38888d83103107f440f1d303307d7</document_key><order>400</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-25 13:18:36</sys_created_on><sys_id>70c38888d83103107f440f1d303307dd</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-25 13:18:36</sys_updated_on><value>35aa573fd7802200bdbaee5b5e610375</value><variable display_value="MID Application">f5e56d79b3101300176b051a16a8dce4</variable></sys_variable_value><sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_hub_step_instance</document><document_key>28c38888d83103107f440f1d303307d7</document_key><order>600</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-25 13:18:36</sys_created_on><sys_id>34c38888d83103107f440f1d303307dd</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-25 13:18:36</sys_updated_on><value>  (function execute(inputs, outputs) {
    try {
        // 1. Criar o lote de importação (Import Set)
        var importSetGR = new GlideRecord('sys_import_set');
        importSetGR.initialize();
        importSetGR.mode = 'synchronous'; 
        importSetGR.table_name = 'imp_rate_model_line'; // Usando a tabela nativa do seu arquivo
        importSetGR.state = 'loading';
        var importSetSysId = importSetGR.insert();

        // 2. Inserir a linha com os dados mapeados do Xero
        var stagingGR = new GlideRecord('imp_rate_model_line');
        stagingGR.initialize();
        stagingGR.sys_import_set = importSetSysId;
        
        // Mapeando as variáveis que vieram dos Inputs da sua Action
        stagingGR.u_rate = inputs.rate;                      // Ex: 150.00
        stagingGR.u_resource_role = inputs.resource_role;    // SysID ou String da Role
        stagingGR.u_rate_model = inputs.rate_model;          // SysID do Modelo de Taxa
        stagingGR.u_start_date = inputs.start_date;          // Data de início (YYYY-MM-DD)
        
        // Se você tiver um ID único da task do Xero para evitar duplicados, adicione aqui:
        // stagingGR.u_xero_task_id = inputs.xero_task_id; 

        var stagingSysId = stagingGR.insert();

        // Atualizar o estado do lote para carregado
        importSetGR.get(importSetSysId);
        importSetGR.state = 'loaded';
        importSetGR.update();

        // 3. Disparar o Transform Map nativo
        var tU = new sn_impex.TransformerAPI();
        var transformMapSysId = "79d492d6734023005cbb2b158bf6a7cf"; // SysID do seu Rate Model Line Transform Map
        tU.transformImportSet(transformMapSysId, importSetSysId);

        outputs.status = "Success";
    } catch (ex) {
        outputs.status = "Erro: " + ex.message;
        gs.error("Erro na Flow Action do Xero: " + ex.message);
    }
})(inputs, outputs);
</value><variable display_value="Script">71aa7f6647032200b4fad7527c9a719b</variable></sys_variable_value><sys_element_mapping action="delete_multiple" query="table=var__m_sys_hub_step_ext_output_28c38888d83103107f440f1d303307d7^id=28c38888d83103107f440f1d303307d7"/><sys_element_mapping action="delete_multiple" query="table=var__m_sys_flow_step_definition_input_106afb6647032200b4fad7527c9a71e7^id=28c38888d83103107f440f1d303307d7"/><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=28c38888d83103107f440f1d303307d7"/><sys_hub_step_ext_input action="delete_multiple" query="model=28c38888d83103107f440f1d303307d7"/><sys_hub_step_ext_output action="delete_multiple" query="model=28c38888d83103107f440f1d303307d7^sys_idNOT INa8c38888d83103107f440f1d303307d8"/><sys_hub_step_ext_output action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><array>false</array><array_denormalized>false</array_denormalized><attributes>element_mapping_provider=com.glide.flow_design.action.data.FlowDesignVariableMapper,uiType=string,uiTypeLabel=String,uiUniqueId=25f2ff59-096f-4c71-887f-c21431cecdf7</attributes><audit>false</audit><calculation><![CDATA[(function calculatedFieldValue(current) {
